svg.title: MediTrack admin workflow and symptom routing engine flow
svg.desc: Left: admin logs in, manages doctors and slots, views reports. Right: patient types symptoms, C# scores keyword dictionary, top department returned, doctors filtered.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What can an admin do in MediTrack?')
sendPrompt('How does admin manage appointment slots in MediTrack?')
sendPrompt('What does the MediTrack admin dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('What kind of reports can admin generate in MediTrack?')
sendPrompt('How does the patient enter symptoms in MediTrack?')
sendPrompt('How does SymptomRoutingService score keywords in C#?')
sendPrompt('Explain the keyword scoring algorithm in SymptomRoutingService')
sendPrompt('What does MediTrack return from the symptom routing API?')
sendPrompt('How does MediTrack filter doctors after symptom routing?')

svg.text: Amber = admin operations | Teal = routing reads | Purple = C# scoring logic
